statement: In every magma, Equation 1367 (`x = y * (((z * y) * x) * y)`) implies Equation 341 (`x * y = y * (z * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0060
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z y) x) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op y (op z w))
